name: com.acchosen.vr-stage-lighting
description: A collection of HLSL shaders, UdonSharp scripts, 3D models, prefabs, and assets designed to emulate the real control, quality, and complexity of professional stage lighting into VRChat in as many ways as possible. Includes a Unity 6 URP realtime light path that drives genuine scene illumination and raymarched volumetric beams from DMX or AudioLink data for projects targeting URP outside VRChat.
